title: IGNcom ranks Shinji as No 1 Greatest Anime Character
display_title: IGNcom ranks Shinji as No 1 Greatest Anime Character
wikitext:
[]: IGN.com ranks Shinji as No. 1 Greatest Anime Character             Quote Post by Merkaba » Wed Feb 12, 2014 11:24 am [url]http://www.ign.com/articles/2014/02/04/top-25-greatest-anime-characters?page=5[/url] I started reading at number 25, and was scared he wasn't going to make the list. Then, I got chills when I saw them rank him number 1. It's nice to know that other people realize that he is THE greatest character of all time. :)

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Feb 12, 2014 11:32 am These lists are always highly subjective. Last time Shinji barely made the list: IGN's Top 25 Anime Characters of All Time list There's also this one: Evangelion makes it into IGN's top 100 animated series

[]:             Quote Post by amitakartok » Wed Feb 12, 2014 11:35 am Asuka is also on the list, as No. 13.

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Wed Feb 12, 2014 11:38 am amitakartok wrote: Asuka is also on the list, as No. 13.

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Wed Feb 12, 2014 11:48 am AWESSOME! I knew the previous list that was horrible, that said that he could have been good. This is awesome! Happy that Goku is up there. Yes he's simple, but that's the point. I don't really like adult Goku though. Kid Goku. That guy knew what life was about. My heroe. Read the manga. Not the anime! Goku is the best. EDIT: LOL at a guy complaining about Goku, saying that people aren't aware of the deep characters in anime, but calls Shinji the worst character ever...

[]:             Quote Post by Princess Asuka » Wed Feb 12, 2014 1:25 pm I'm glad Shinji and Asuka are up there, but sad that Sailor Moon isn't up there. She's iconic too! Right, up there with Shinji, Asuka, Rei, Misato, and the rest of the Sailor Senshi, on my list.

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Wed Feb 12, 2014 2:11 pm Princess Asuka wrote: I'm glad Shinji and Asuka are up there, but sad that Sailor Moon isn't up there. She's iconic too! Right, up there with Shinji, Asuka, Rei, Misato, and the rest of the Sailor Senshi, on my list.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Wed Feb 12, 2014 2:16 pm Merkaba wrote: It's nice to know that other people realize that he is THE greatest character of all time. :)

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Wed Feb 12, 2014 2:41 pm Congratulations, Shinji-kun!

[]:             Quote Post by driftking18594 » Wed Feb 12, 2014 7:01 pm Dataprime wrote: Could they have not found more worse picture to use? Seriously, that's a bad image

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Wed Feb 12, 2014 7:16 pm Kendrix wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Stillborn » Wed Feb 12, 2014 7:29 pm Luckily for you, It'll never happen.

[]:             Quote Post by Princess Asuka » Wed Feb 12, 2014 9:09 pm kuribo-04 wrote: They could only fit 25. I also miss Krilin, and his lack of hair.

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Wed Feb 12, 2014 10:03 pm Princess Asuka wrote: Well, I barely recognized any of the characters. In a personal list I'd have Shinji, Misato, Rei, Asuka, Sailor Moon, Tuxedo Mask, Madoka, Sailor Mercury, Sailor Venus, Sailor Chibimoon, Sailor Pluto, Sailor Neptune, and Ryo Urawa (character from the anime who liked Mercury). ;)

[]:             Quote Post by heavytread » Wed Feb 12, 2014 11:03 pm This list is to be discredited as Rei isn't on it Although still yea Shinji is #1 on someone else's list is bad i only recognize five characters on the list

[]:             Quote Post by Princess Asuka » Wed Feb 12, 2014 11:03 pm kuribo-04 wrote: I would have included more Eva characters without a doubt. Rei and Gendo please! But they needed variety. Still, I'm happy. The fact that Shinji actually made it, I still can't believe it. This contradicts everything I knew about the internet.

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Feb 13, 2014 11:19 am Princess Asuka wrote: I love Shinji, he's cute, but he shows just how human we are.

[]:             Quote Post by Princess Asuka » Thu Feb 13, 2014 5:07 pm kuribo-04 wrote: I like him too, and he's incredibly well written, but people hate him. They really hate him. It's scary, how can you hate a fictional character so much. They are also horrible people. What these people say is that, if you have problems, you aren't of any use to others, so you are shit. Really, I hope these people don't act like that with people in real life.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Thu Feb 13, 2014 5:21 pm In my opinion, people who manage to hate Shinji have a severe lack of empathy.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Feb 13, 2014 5:49 pm This is kind of a meta question, but can anyone tell me why they care what IGN or any other random group thinks about such matters?
summary: []: IGN.com ranks Shinji as No. 1 Greatest Anime Character             Quote Post by Merkaba » Wed Feb 12, 2014 11:24 am [url]http://www.ign.com/articles/2014/02/04/top-25-greatest-anime-characters?page=5[/url] I started reading at number 25, and was scared he wasn't going to make the list. Then, I got chills when I saw them rank him number 1. It's nice to know that other people realize that he is THE greatest character of all time.
